name: Content Multiple Assessments Then Human Review Pipeline
description: Content workflow with two required assessments before human review and publication.
outcome: A content package clears multiple assessments, then a human approval gate, before final publication.

definition.process_instructions: The content research lead drafts the packet. The fact-check assessor and editorial policy assessor both assess the same subject revision. A human approval gate decides whether the doubly-assessed packet may continue. The publication editor finalizes the release packet only after all assessments and the human decision clear.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: reviewable-draft
stages.goal: The draft content and evidence are ready.

stages.name: operator-approval
stages.goal: A human decision exists for the assessed draft.
